description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front and side facades. The structure is primarily composed of concrete and glass, with black and white exterior finishes that create a striking contrast. The front yard includes a driveway with a parked car, landscaped greenery, and several palm trees, while the backyard boasts a swimming pool and a spacious patio area. The interior layout is open-plan, with multiple rooms visible from above, including living spaces, bedrooms, and bathrooms. The property is enclosed by a low wall, providing privacy and a defined boundary. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on outdoor living and natural light.
description: A sleek, modern bungalow with flat roof, large glass windows, a pool, and landscaped yard, finished in black and white tones.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear and side of the bungalow, highlighting the pool, patio, and large glass windows.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the left side, revealing the pool, patio, and a partial view of the driveway and carport.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front facade, featuring the main entrance, driveway, car, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the right side and rear, focusing on the enclosed yard, palm trees, and the pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with large grouped side windows
